secondary_archetype: B2B/B2C Product Manager for artist-facing marketing tools

level_signals: 2+ years of experience working as a product manager or similar discipline
Comp range $95,658 - $136,654 base, consistent with mid-level PM at a large tech company
Sets vision and manages roadmap for a squad (not an org-level leadership role)

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 2+ years of experience working as a product manager or similar discipline (i.e. business analytics or strategy, product insights, engineering) in cross-functional teams
You have experience collaborating with a wide range of non-product partners in a matrixed organization, and understand how to influence and inspire teams
You're a compelling storyteller who can communicate in succinct and inspiring ways to a variety of audience types
You have a team-first approach and have developed techniques to ensure your teams are happy, motivated and productive
You are comfortable working with distributed teams across multiple offices and time zones

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You ideally have worked on a B2B or B2C product
You're passionate about the opportunity to better serve artists & their teams

scope.surface: Spotify for Artists artist promotion suite (Marquee, Showcase) — campaign access, configuration, delivery, and listener-artist matching
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS / self-serve marketing platform for artists and their teams
core_responsibilities: Set the vision and manage the roadmap for a squad within the artist promotion organization
Build alignment against your roadmap and gain support from relevant cross-functional teams to deliver impact
Prioritize new features based on customer needs, business potential, and technical platform scalability
Set and follow metrics that advise us of the success of the products and their impact on the Spotify ecosystem and users
Partner with PMs, design, insights, and engineering teams on the design, implementation, delivery and adoption of features

green_flags: Compensation range explicitly disclosed ($95,658 - $136,654 base plus equity)
Clear product surface with named products (Marquee, Showcase)
Relatively low years-of-experience bar (2+ years) for a recognized company
Rich benefits package disclosed (6-month parental leave, 23 PTO days, etc.)
Role has direct artist impact with a meaningful mission (helping 1M+ active artists)
red_flags: Role is onsite in New York only with no mention of remote eligibility
Visa sponsorship and work authorization requirements not addressed in JD
Compensation ceiling ($136K) is relatively modest for New York cost-of-living for a Spotify PM role

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from comp range and 2+ years requirement)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description as B2B self-serve marketing platform)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated in JD)
location.type (inferred as onsite; JD says 'This role is based in New York' with no hybrid/remote language)
location.work_auth and visa_sponsorship (not mentioned anywhere in JD)
ambiguities: The JD does not explicitly state whether the role is hybrid or fully onsite; 'This role is based in New York' and Eastern timezone collaboration requirements suggest onsite or at minimum NYC-anchored hybrid, but no explicit hybrid policy is described. Treated as onsite.

B2B vs B2C classification: Spotify for Artists serves both artists (B2B-like) and fans (B2C); JD lists B2B or B2C as a nice-to-have rather than a hard requirement, suggesting the actual product straddles both models.

'similar discipline (i.e. business analytics or strategy, product insights, engineering)' — it is ambiguous whether non-PM titles count toward the 2+ year minimum or are listed as equivalents. Treated as years_of_experience with hard severity based on unconditional phrasing.
